g.text: This guide provides an overview of how to use
TUI (Textual User Interface) application for interacting
gojeera's interface is navigable using mouse and
The main view is inspired by the Jira Cloud web UI, with
a search panel on the left, work item details in the
middle, and work item fields panel on the right.
gojeera uses profiles for authentication. Each profile
stores Jira connection metadata while secrets are stored
: Jira site URL + email + API token
